methodsAttempted.query: site:ntu.edu.tw 生成式 AI 政策
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search was attempted first but failed due insufficient credits; fallback web search returned course, thesis and DFLL guidance results.

methodsAttempted.query: site:ntu.edu.tw 生成式人工智慧 指引
methodsAttempted.notes: Found official DFLL student-use guidance and unrelated repository/event results.
Found academic-integrity adjacent official pages; selected only policy/guidance sources.

methodsAttempted.query: site:ntu.edu.tw AI 工具 學生 作業
methodsAttempted.notes: Found NTU course syllabus examples and official guidance; rejected course-only results.

methodsAttempted.query: site:ntu.edu.tw 人工智慧 教學 評量
methodsAttempted.notes: Found the central NTU DLC/CTLD guidance page for teaching and assessment.

methodsAttempted.query: site:ntu.edu.tw 生成式AI 資安 隱私
methodsAttempted.notes: Found official research/publication ethics sources with AI disclosure, privacy and confidentiality guidance.
Found GMBA English guidance and event/course results; Traditional Chinese official sources were preferred for claims.
Mostly third-party or English fallback material; not needed once official Traditional Chinese sources were available.

methodsAttempted.query: "國立臺灣大學" "生成式AI" "學術誠信"
methodsAttempted.notes: Found official DFLL guidance and HPM conduct rules plus event-only results.

summary: Firecrawl search was attempted as the primary discovery mechanism but failed for lack of credits. Fallback web search and official-domain fetches found four usable official NTU sources in Traditional Chinese: central DLC/CTLD teaching guidance, DFLL student AI guidance, Health Policy and Management conduct rules, and Social Work journal publication ethics. Course-only, thesis/research, event-only, third-party and non-university sources were rejected.
